ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: The response is relevant and consistent with the persona but lacks a bit of naturalness in phrasing, which slightly affects overall quality.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>Overall good balance between context relevance, consistency with the persona as an NPC merchant who values fair exchange and discretion, but could improve naturalness in language.
